steps.title: Interpret the identity
steps.content: Both sides are identical, so every real $x$ satisfies the equation: infinitely many solutions. C is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above matches the correct answer, Infinitely many, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore C is correct.
